_meta.notes: Ontology of beginner-tier piano concepts. Each concept has prereqs forming a DAG. Path generator does topological sort: given a piece's required_concepts and a user's mastered_concepts, output the ordered set of concepts to teach. Lesson generator turns each concept into a 6-page lesson YAML. EVERY lesson must use the steps/skips/leaps method vocabulary regardless of topic — see docs/v2-architecture.md.

concepts.name: The 2-group
concepts.description: Pair of black keys. Visual anchor for finding C and D.

concepts.name: The 3-group
concepts.description: Triplet of black keys. Visual anchor for finding F.

concepts.name: Black keys
concepts.description: Repeating 2-group + 3-group pattern across the keyboard.

concepts.name: White keys
concepts.description: The seven letter names A-G, repeating.

concepts.name: Middle C
concepts.description: Anchor note in the centre of the keyboard, found from a 2-group.

concepts.name: Finding F
concepts.description: F is the white key just left of any 3-group.

concepts.name: Finding G
concepts.description: G is the white key one step right of F.

concepts.name: Step
concepts.description: Move to the immediately adjacent letter. The most fundamental motion.

concepts.name: Skip
concepts.description: Skip one letter. Two stairs at a time.

concepts.name: Leap
concepts.description: Any interval larger than a skip.

concepts.name: Octave
concepts.description: Same letter, different floor. Eight white keys apart.

concepts.name: Ascending motion
concepts.description: Going up the staircase — pitch rising.

concepts.name: Descending motion
concepts.description: Going down the staircase — pitch falling.

concepts.name: Right hand
concepts.description: Plays melody usually. Fingers numbered 1-5 (thumb to pinky).

concepts.name: Left hand
concepts.description: Plays bass usually. Fingers numbered 1-5 (thumb to pinky).

concepts.name: Finger numbers
concepts.description: 1=thumb, 2=index, 3=middle, 4=ring, 5=pinky on each hand.

concepts.name: C position (right hand)
concepts.description: Right hand thumb on Middle C, fingers stepping up to G.

concepts.name: C position (left hand)
concepts.description: Left hand pinky on C below Middle C, thumb on G below Middle C.

concepts.name: Treble clef
concepts.description: G clef. Curls around the G line — anchors the staff.

concepts.name: Bass clef
concepts.description: F clef. Two dots flank the F line — anchors the bass staff.

concepts.name: Staff lines
concepts.description: Five horizontal lines. Notes sit on lines or in spaces.

concepts.name: Staff spaces
concepts.description: Four spaces between staff lines.

concepts.name: Line to space (a step)
concepts.description: Moving from a line to an adjacent space is a STEP on the staircase.

concepts.name: Line to line (a skip)
concepts.description: Moving from one line to the next line is a SKIP.

concepts.name: Middle C on the staff
concepts.description: Middle C sits on a ledger line just below the treble staff.

concepts.name: Ledger lines
concepts.description: Tiny extra lines for notes above or below the staff.

concepts.name: Grand staff
concepts.description: Treble staff above, bass staff below, joined for piano.

concepts.name: Sharp (#)
concepts.description: A sharp moves the note up a half-step (one black key right).

concepts.name: Flat (b)
concepts.description: A flat moves the note down a half-step (one black key left).

concepts.name: Natural sign
concepts.description: Cancels a sharp or flat — back to the white key.

concepts.name: Key of C major
concepts.description: No sharps, no flats. All white keys.

concepts.name: Key of G major
concepts.description: One sharp (F#).

concepts.name: Key of F major
concepts.description: One flat (Bb).

concepts.name: Beat
concepts.description: The pulse — a steady step in time.

concepts.name: Quarter note
concepts.description: One beat. The basic step on the rhythm staircase.

concepts.name: Half note
concepts.description: Two beats. Two steps in time.

concepts.name: Whole note
concepts.description: Four beats. A long stretched step.

concepts.name: Dotted half note
concepts.description: Half note plus a dot — three beats. A longer step on the rhythm staircase.

concepts.name: Quarter rest
concepts.description: One beat of silence. Skip a step in time.

concepts.name: 4/4 time
concepts.description: Four beats per bar. Four stairs in a row.

concepts.name: 3/4 time
concepts.description: Three beats per bar. Like a waltz.

concepts.name: Tempo
concepts.description: How fast the beats step by — slow walk, brisk walk, run.
